creator: richw@richw.org
text:
Following up on my earlier comments:

I seem to be able to reproduce the problem reliably by running two
concurrent "dd" commands (copying data from each of my two SATA
drives to /dev/null simultaneously), and waiting a few minutes.

Reading off just one of the drives wasn't enough to generate any
timeout warnings, but reading from both at the same time apparently
did the trick.

Rich Wales            richw@richw.org            http://www.richw.org
